ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AGI Greenpac Ltd. is implementing the mandatory transfer of equity shares and associated unclaimed dividends to the Investor Education and Protection Fund (IEPF) Authority. This action is required by Indian company law for dividends that have remained unclaimed for seven consecutive years, specifically from Financial Year 2018-19 onwards. Affected shareholders have until September 15, 2026, to claim their outstanding dividends, failing which their shares will be transferred to the IEPF, necessitating a more complex reclamation process directly from the government fund.
